title: Blue Dart is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Blue Dart is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Blue Dart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Blue Dart:
Blue Dart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart!
